telemetry: EnsureSchema logs warnings via slog when individual DDL statements fail; no metrics or spans registered in this package
key_invariants: cypherSafePattern [a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]* guards all label and property key interpolation
BatchMergeEntities splits UID-identity and name-identity rows for direct index hits
BatchMergeRelationships requires all rows to share source label, target label, and rel type
Module uses an index not a constraint because it is merged by name globally and by uid per-repo
schema.go line 57: Module uses CREATE INDEX not CONSTRAINT because of shared-name collision risk
DeleteFileFromGraph runs two Cypher statements: delete file+elements, then prune orphaned directories
ResetRepositorySubtreeInGraph preserves the Repository node itself; DeleteRepositoryFromGraph removes it
CypherStatement and CypherExecutor mirror storage/cypher types to avoid import cycles
